# Daily QC Checklist

Use this before publishing.

```text
[ ] Hypothesis selected
[ ] Primary signal selected
[ ] Platform/surface selected
[ ] First frame screenshot passes mobile readability
[ ] Hook lands in 1–3 seconds
[ ] First payoff arrives within target window
[ ] Captions corrected if speech matters
[ ] Text does not cover key visual subject
[ ] Proof/example included if educational
[ ] CTA matches content value
[ ] Caption/title classify the topic
[ ] Hashtags relevant
[ ] Trust risk checked
[ ] Asset code assigned
[ ] Post logged
```

If three or more boxes fail, do not publish. Rebuild.
